hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & Technical Founder
hero.subtitle: Building B2B SaaS products and shipping client solutions
hero.description: I design and ship production applications that generate real revenue. Built Oxyon AI (SaaS automation platform) and DiskLimp (B2B services site) serving 15+ clients. Fullstack: React, Node.js, TypeScript, Next.js, Flutter. Exploring Web3 (Rust, Solana, smart contract security). 3+ years shipping products, not just features.
about.title: About Me
about: I'm a Computer Engineering student and a dedicated Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience in building web applications using React and Node.js. Over time, I've developed several projects that showcase my ability to work across both the front-end and back-end. I'm constantly learning and exploring new technologies in the field of computing. Currently, I'm studying Web3 and smart contract security, as well as data engineering to grow as a developer and deliver better solutions.
what-i-build.title: What I Build
what-i-build.desc: End-to-end products that solve real problems. Not just code - complete solutions with conversion optimization, product thinking, and business impact.
what-i-build.1: B2B SaaS Platforms (full frontend + backend + growth integration)
what-i-build.2: High-conversion Web Applications (landing pages, dashboards, e-commerce)
what-i-build.3: Scalable APIs & Microservices (Node.js, C#, async architectures)
what-i-build.4: AI-powered Automation (LLM integration, workflow optimization, intelligent bots)
what-i-build.5: Web3 & Blockchain (Smart contracts, security auditing, Solana development)
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.1.title: Oxyon AI: B2B Automation & AI Platform
projects.1.stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, APIs Integration, WhatsApp Bot
projects.1.desc: Professional SaaS platform delivering AI automation solutions to Brazilian enterprises. Drives operational efficiency and revenue generation.
projects.1.problem: Enterprises struggle with manual processes, repetitive tasks, and siloed data. They need integrated solutions combining AI automation, data dashboards, and process optimization without building from scratch. Decision-makers need clear ROI and consultative guidance.
projects.1.solution: Built Oxyon AI: Complete B2B platform offering 1) AI-powered workflow automation (intelligent bots, API integrations), 2) Custom web development (landing pages, institutional sites, dashboards), 3) System integrations & scalable backends. Includes diagnostic methodology, project tracking, and ongoing support.
projects.1.technical: Next.js frontend: High-conversion landing page with smooth animations, responsive design, problem-solution positioning. Built WhatsApp integration for instant lead capture. Backend: Process orchestration, API integration layer, real-time status tracking. Infrastructure: Vercel deployment, scalable architecture for enterprise clients. Focus on performance (LCP < 1.5s) and conversion optimization.
projects.1.impact: ✓ Serves 15+ Brazilian real estate & services companies ✓ Avg 120h/month operational time savings per client ✓ 98% client satisfaction with improved workflows ✓ Recurring revenue model (monthly SLAs) ✓ Positioned as strategic consultant, not vendor
projects.1.details: Professional automation and AI integration platform for medium to large businesses. Combines strategic consulting with technical execution. Delivers measurable improvements in operational efficiency, cost reduction, and scalability.
projects.2.title: DiskLimp: Professional Services B2B Platform
projects.2.stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Tailwind, SEO Optimization
projects.2.desc: E-commerce and service directory platform for professional cleaning distribution. Showcases 5+ product lines and 20+ distributor partnerships.
projects.2.problem: DiskLimp needed a modern web presence that positioned them as industry authority, displayed product/service offerings clearly, and enabled customer inquiries at scale. Competition from larger competitors required professional branding and clear value communication.
projects.2.solution: Built complete B2B platform: 1) Product showcase with distributor integration (featuring Netter, Hobart, Winterhalter brands), 2) Service portfolio (products, rentals, papers, dispensers, technical support), 3) Lead capture via WhatsApp, 4) SEO-optimized structure for local search dominance.
projects.2.technical: Next.js frontend: Image optimization for fast loading (photos of products/operations), responsive design for mobile field users. SEO architecture: structured data markup, geographic optimization for local search (Poços de Caldas region). Backend: Product catalog CMS, inquiry management, WhatsApp integration. Performance: Lighthouse score 92+. Deployment on Vercel.
projects.2.impact: ✓ 400% increase in qualified leads (WhatsApp inquiries) ✓ Ranks #1 for 'professional cleaning solutions [region]' ✓ Improved customer trust through professional brand presence ✓ Enabled online service showcasing (previously offline-only) ✓ 20-year company modernized digital presence
projects.2.details: Modern B2B platform for professional services company. Transformed offline-only business into web-enabled revenue channel with clear USP and professional positioning.
projects.3.title: Upload-AI: AI-Powered Video Optimization
projects.3.stack: React.js, Node.js, TypeScript, OpenAI API, Tailwind CSS
projects.3.desc: Content automation platform using AI to generate SEO-optimized video descriptions in seconds.
projects.3.problem: Content creators manually write descriptions (30+ min per video), leading to inconsistent SEO optimization and lost YouTube ranking opportunities. Professional libraries charge $100+/month for basic optimization.
projects.3.solution: Built full-stack SaaS: 1) React UI with video upload + progress streaming, 2) Node.js orchestration with OpenAI API integration, 3) Smart prompt templates for titles/descriptions, 4) One-click clipboard copy for publisher integration.
projects.3.technical: React frontend: Drag-drop file upload, real-time transcript display, streaming generation feedback. Node.js backend: Async video processing, OpenAI prompt chaining (transcription → optimization), error recovery and rate limiting. Security: Timeout protection, input validation, file size limits. Architecture: Scalable for concurrent uploads.
projects.3.impact: ✓ Reduces creator workload by 30 min per video ✓ Improves YouTube SEO ranking metrics ✓ 'Build-in-public' demo earned 500+ GitHub stars ✓ Demonstrates: AI integration, async architecture, content automation
projects.3.details: AI-powered content optimization tool showing ability to integrate cutting-edge APIs, design conversational UX, and solve real creator problems with automation.
other-projects.title: Technical Depth & Learning Projects
other-projects.desc: Advanced projects demonstrating systems thinking, security expertise, and learning velocity:
other-projects.1.title: Rust-to-Solana: 30-Day Learning Challenge
other-projects.1.desc: Intensive self-directed Rust learning journey building daily projects. Mastering systems programming and preparing for blockchain development. Shows commitment to growth and technical depth.
other-projects.2.title: Malicious Contract Detector
other-projects.2.desc: Web3 security tool analyzing smart contracts for vulnerabilities. Demonstrates security research mindset and ability to prevent exploits. Shows Web3 expertise beyond development.
other-projects.2.stack: Python, Security Analysis, Smart Contract Auditing
other-projects.3.title: Financial API (ASP.NET Core)
other-projects.3.desc: Production-grade finance management API. JWT authentication, MySQL, transaction tracking, summaries. Shows enterprise backend architecture knowledge and C# proficiency.
other-projects.4.title: External API Consumer (Resilience Patterns)
other-projects.4.desc: Advanced ASP.NET Core demonstrating resilient external API consumption. Includes caching, auditing, retries, error handling. Shows production-ready mindset and architectural patterns.
other-projects.5.title: Dashboard Project
other-projects.5.desc: Data visualization and analytics dashboard. Real-time metrics, interactive charts, performance optimization. Product thinking applied to internal tools.
other-projects.6.title: Report Bot
other-projects.6.desc: Automated reporting and alert system. Shows ability to build operational tools that reduce manual effort and improve decision-making speed.
current-focus.title: Current Focus
current-focus.1: 🦀 Rust Systems Programming - Deep dive through 30-day challenge. Building async CLI tools and learning memory safety patterns for high-performance systems.
current-focus.2: 💎 Solana & Web3 Security - Smart contract development, security auditing, and malicious contract detection. Combining blockchain expertise with security-first mindset.
current-focus.3: 🏗️ Enterprise Backend Patterns - Resilient API consumption, caching strategies, distributed systems architecture. Building systems that scale reliably.
tech-stack.title: Tech Stack
tech-stack.frontend.items: React.js (3+ years), TailwindCSS, CSS-in-JS, Next.js (current framework), Accessibility & Performance optimization
tech-stack.backend.items: Node.js + Express.js, RESTful API design, Authentication & Authorization (JWT, OAuth), Database design (PostgreSQL, Firebase)
tech-stack.devops.items: Docker (containerization & deployment), Git (version control), CI/CD fundamentals, API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI)

cta.title: Let's Build Something Great
cta.desc: Don't see the right fit? Let's talk. I'm open to full-time roles, contract work, and technical mentoring.
highlighted.title: Highlighted Projects
highlighted.1.title: upload-AI
highlighted.1.description: Auto-generates SEO-optimized video titles and descriptions. React.js & Node.js.
highlighted.1.details: Web app that takes a video, generates a transcript and uses prompt templates to create SEO-friendly titles and descriptions via OpenAI. Implemented the upload flow with progress feedback, background processing, and safeguards for timeouts/rate limits.
highlighted.2.title: TransactionsREST-API
highlighted.2.description: RESTful API for managing financial transactions with authentication and real-world patterns.
highlighted.2.details: REST API for personal finances: create, list and categorize transactions, with authentication, pagination and filtering by period/type. Input validation and consistent error responses. Scripts and a Docker setup to run the API locally.
highlighted.3.title: challenge-01-nodeJS
highlighted.3.description: Ignite Node.js challenge: building a RESTful API to practice back-end fundamentals.
highlighted.3.details: Educational Node.js challenge: build a REST API from scratch to practice routing, middleware, request validation and persistence. Emphasis on clean code, small commits and readable endpoints.
highlighted.4.title: market-api
highlighted.4.description: API for a fictional market, created for learning REST architecture and TypeScript.
highlighted.4.details: Practice API that models a small market: products, customers and orders. CRUD endpoints, authentication and basic business rules (e.g., stock checks before checkout). Written in TypeScript following REST conventions.
highlighted.5.title: teste-tecnico-control361
highlighted.5.description: Technical test repository with a back-end application developed in TypeScript.
highlighted.5.details: Technical assessment under time constraints. Implemented the requested endpoints and business rules, keeping a clear folder structure and strict TypeScript types. Added concise documentation in the README to run and test the API.
highlighted.6.title: crud-examples
highlighted.6.description: CRUD examples in different languages, all connected to PostgreSQL with standardized setup.
highlighted.6.details: Collection of CRUD examples across different stacks, all using PostgreSQL. Standardized .env files and Docker scripts to bootstrap the database quickly. Useful as a learning reference and as a starting point for new services.
